allow: Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh "Build a complete Auth module with 6 endpoints: register, login, logout, refresh, forgot-password, reset-password. Includes JWT strategy, password hashing, validation DTOs, httpOnly cookies, and transactional user creation." --json --short-name "auth-module" "Complete Auth module with JWT authentication")

Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh "Add comprehensive unit tests to the Auth module: 27 AuthService tests \(register, login, refresh, logout, forgot-password, reset-password, sanitizeUser\) + 3 AuthController tests \(DTO validation, cookie setting, cookie clearing\). Jest with mocks, no real database." --json --short-name "auth-unit-tests" "Auth module unit tests with Jest")
